project_type: Next.js 16 App Router frontend MVP (no backend)
build_system: Next.js 16 with bun as package manager. node_modules already installed. AGENTS.md warns about breaking changes in Next.js 16 - read docs in node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing code.
test_framework: No test framework configured. Verification via build and lint only.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'bun run build' - should compile and generate static pages without errors. 2. Run 'bun run lint' - should pass with no ESLint errors.
setup_instructions: node_modules already installed. Use 'bun' for package management (npm/npx not available). Branch 'feat/financial-assistant-app' already created from main.
environment_constraints: npm/npx not available - use bun. No real backend exists - authentication and data must be simulated client-side using localStorage and React state/context. Next.js 16 has breaking changes - params is a Promise, use 'use client' directive for interactive components.
contribution_requirements: Responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes required. Semantic HTML for all layout sections. Follow existing patterns: green/teal primary palette (primary-50 to primary-900), neutral grays. Server components by default, 'use client' only for interactive pieces.
key_patterns: Components in app/components/. Server components by default (no directive). Client components marked with 'use client'. Tailwind CSS 4 with @theme inline custom tokens in globals.css. Link from next/link. Existing landing page at app/page.tsx composing Header, Hero, Features, EmailSignup, Footer. Geist font family.
directory_structure: app/ - main application code with page.tsx (landing), layout.tsx (root), globals.css (theme), components/ (shared UI). public/ - static assets. New routes should be added as folders inside app/ (e.g., app/login/page.tsx, app/onboarding/page.tsx, app/dashboard/page.tsx).
